title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
